Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Water Purifier + Air Fryer
programme.desc: Upgrade your kitchen with the Acerpure Aqua WP5 Water Purifier and 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer—the ultimate duo for convenience and health. Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Essence of Chicken
programme.desc: Taste Better, feel better. This premium essence of chicken helps boost energy, stamina, and immunity. Made from 180-day-old hormone-free chickens, it uses high-pressure double-boiling to ensure maximum nutrient absorption. It is 100% pure and natural, with no fat, cholesterol, or preservatives, caramel added. 口味更佳，感觉更好！这系列优质鸡精有助于提升精力、体力和免疫力。它选用180日龄无激素散养鸡，采用高压隔水炖煮工艺，确保营养成分最大程度地被吸收。100%纯天然，不含脂肪、胆固醇或添加添加焦糖和防腐剂。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kplass Cough and Flu Relief Patch
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family. 无需药物的贴布，结合远红外线和穴位疗法，自然缓解感冒症状。感冒缓解贴舒缓鼻塞、流鼻涕、鼻窦压力和寒冷不适。止咳贴有成人装和儿童装，帮助缓解咳嗽、喉咙不适，同时促进血液循环，让呼吸更顺畅、睡眠更安心。温和贴肤，每天可用，长达6小时舒适守护，全家都适用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Q'Sai Knee Supporter Collagen and Glucosamine
programme.desc: A premium joint formula with 4g dose of collagen peptides per serving combines Hyaluronic Acid and Chondroitin to lubricate and cushion joints. NAG, a more advanced form of glucosamine. As a direct building block for Hyaluronic Acid, NAG helps cartilage retain water, reduces inflammation. Consuming Both products together creates a powerful synergistic effect for joint repair. 一款优质的关节养护配方，每份含有 4克高剂量胶原蛋白肽，并融合了玻尿酸与软骨素，旨在为关节提供润滑与缓冲保护。 含更先进的 N-乙酰葡萄糖胺（NAG）。NAG 能帮助软骨锁住水分，并具有缓解关节炎症的作用。 同时服用 Q’SAI 这组护膝黄金搭档，能够产生强效的协同作用，全方位加速关节的修复与保养。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kyocera Ceramic Knife
programme.desc: Ultra-sharp, lightweight, and rust-proof—preserve food’s natural color and nutrients. Effortlessly cut fruits, vegetables, and boneless meat. Reinforced black blades stay sharp 10× longer than steel. Smooth surfaces make cleaning quick and easy, delivering precise, effortless cutting every time 体验日本匠心工艺——锋利轻巧、不生锈，保留食材原色和营养。轻松切水果、蔬菜和无骨肉类。强化黑刃版比钢刀锋利10倍更持久，光滑表面易清洗，精准切割，高效省力。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Mirtogenol Plus+
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ is a clinically tested eye health formula developed by ophthalmologists and scientists from the UK and Italy. Powered by two powerful antioxidants—Pycnogenol® and Mirtoselect®—with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision. Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ 为眼科医生及英意科研团队研发的临床护眼配方，结合两大强效抗氧化成分 Pycnogenol® 法国松树皮与 Mirtoselect® 欧洲蓝莓，并添加柑橘类黄酮，有助改善眼部微循环、支持健康眼压、对抗用眼压力与氧化损伤，缓解眼睛干涩、疲劳与模糊感，让视力更清晰、更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Mobot Opula Lite 4 Wheels Mobility Scooter
programme.desc: The most sleek lightweight 18kg four-wheel mobility scooter that is foldable and for overseas traveling. 18公斤四轮电动代步车，时尚轻巧可折叠，方便带出国！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Detox
programme.desc: Feel light, clean, and energized with Kinohimitsu Detox, specially curated for TWS by experts— a trio of Bio-Booster, Detox Enzyme, and Footox. Boost nutrient absorption, ease digestion, and flush out toxins naturally. Ease the constipation and cleansing your body, easy for you to create a daily routine for total wellness. Kinohimitsu 轻盈排毒组专家专为TWS精心打造的轻盈排毒组，让您感觉轻盈、洁净、充满活力——它包含Bio-Booster、Detox Enzyme 和Footox 3项好评排毒保健品。有助于促进营养吸收，促进消化，并自然排出毒素。缓解便秘，净化身体，让您轻松建立维护全面健康的日常习惯。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO ePhysio
programme.desc: An upgraded foot reflexology device that helps relieve aches, swelling, and numbness while improving blood circulation. Made in Korea, it uses low-frequency wave technology to gently stimulate muscle movement and support better blood flow. With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use—helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness. OTO e-Physio 电波保健仪，升级版足部理疗设备，有助缓解酸痛、肿胀与麻木，同时促进血液循环。韩国制造，采用低频电波刺激肌肉，帮助带动血流。配备双通道设计，可连接贴片与腰带，实现全身使用，帮助减轻疲劳、改善循环，提升整体健康状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE Bio-Ray Plantar Fasciitis Compression Foot Sleeves
programme.desc: Targets plantar fasciitis: relieves pain, reduces swelling, and stabilises the plantar fascia. With Japanese Bio-Ray technology, the sleeves compress tendons and muscles to boost blood and oxygen circulation. Arch support ensures stability while walking or standing. Non-slip, soft, breathable—comfortable all day under socks or during activity. 支撑足弓，稳固筋膜，有效缓解疼痛和肿胀。袜子轻轻包覆脚部肌肉和筋腱，加上日本生化能技术，促进血气循环，让脚更舒适、更快恢复。防滑、柔软透气，全天穿都舒服，不管是运动还是穿袜子都合适！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Wellsure
programme.desc: A plant-based protein nutritional drink that ensures a balanced intake of nutrients, promoting visible improvements in muscle health, immune resilience, eye health, and digestion. 一种植物性蛋白全营养饮，确保摄取均衡营养，有助于显著改善肌肉健康、增强免疫力、促进眼部健康和消化功能

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol® is a premium antioxidant supplement made from 100% pure French Maritime Pine Bark extract (100mg), sourced exclusively from the Les Landes de Gascogne forest in France. Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness—benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages. NatureFarm's碧容健®，源自法国滨海松树皮萃取物，是一款高效天然抗氧化营养品。经过160项临床试验与450篇科学研究验证，全面帮助抵御氧化压力，守护大脑、眼睛、心脏、关节、肌肤及血糖健康，适合各年龄层日常保健

programme.title: Ting Tong, Love

programme.title: Perangkap Perkahwinan

programme.title: Jatuh Cinta Buta
programme.desc: Telefilem komedi romantik tentang perkenalan singkat di antara Zulin, seorang gadis yang tidak pernah bercinta, dengan Izlan, seorang duda dalam satu 'blind date' yang diaturkan oleh Nadya Ramanshah.

programme.title: Matahari
programme.desc: Fauzi seorang guru yang telah dihantar untuk berkhidmat di Sabah. Di sana dia telah berkenalan dengan seorang novelis yang sedang mengalami masalah ‘writer’s block’ iaitu Yazid.

programme.title: Meniti Cinta Di Starimost
programme.desc: Iman dipaksa berkahwin dengan Qaseh, anak kepada orang gajinya untuk mewarisi harta bapanya. Percutian mereka di Bosnia membuahkan bibit-bibit cinta. Lakonan Iqram Dinzly, Zarina Zainoordin dan Yana Shamsudin.

programme.title: Jula Juli Bintang Putus Cinta

programme.title: Kampung Kuala Lambat
programme.desc: Kampung Kuala Lambat bagai mengalami sumpahan apabila lelaki yang berkahwin muda akan mati di hari pernikahan mereka namun kejadian ganjil ini tidak berlaku kepada lelaki yang berusia 60 tahun ke atas.

programme.title: Musnahkan Pelamin Anganku
programme.desc: Mikael yang merupakan seorang wedding planner menerima tawaran besar untuk menjayakan sebuah majlis perkahwinan pelanggannya. Namun majlis perkahwinan tersebut merupakan majlis bekas isterinya.

programme.title: Dua
programme.desc: Kisah Farhan yang kehilangan kembarnya Fahrin dalam satu kemalangan tragis. Dia kemudiannya mengambil-alih kehidupan Fahrin namun terperangkap dalam sebuah cinta tiga segi pula. Lakonan Eusoff Hashim dan Sharifah Sakinah.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Zero Chemistry / Von Dropout - EP110
programme.desc: When the kids catch Von Bolts "crying," they build a robot girlfriend to keep him company, but the robot is too advanced and the kids have to play cupid if they're going to get them together. / Von Bolt, feeling underappreciated and overused, quits the team to find himself and a lot of trouble.

programme.title: Mellodees - Old MacDonald - EP8
programme.desc: Dee takes a trip to The Farm. Join him on this fun filled adventure and learn about the different sounds these cute little farm animals make. You might even see some familiar faces!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep17 - EP117
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Babysitters - EP122
programme.desc: The Shaq Paq has their work cut out for them this time as a routine babysitting gig turns into a search and rescue.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep6 - EP106
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep7 - EP7
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Humility - EP112
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn the importance of humility. We will understand how to have good sportsmanship and respect the efforts of your opponent. We will learn that with humility we can put aside arrogance and anger. We will also discover that there is no problem in asking for help from others because in doing so, that is also an act of humility.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Responsibility - EP113
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn that we must fulfil our responsibilities, and in that way, we will be able to be in harmony with other people. We will discover how to be attentive to help both at school and at home. And in this way, we can learn more each day and be up to date with each task.

programme.title: Mellodees - You Are My Sunshine - EP7
programme.desc: It's story time! Dee and Teddy snuggle up with a good book before bed time. Sing-A-Long as they take you on an adventure in the jungle while reading the story of "You Are My Sunshine"!

Famed for its Ming and Qing architecture, this is where she learns martial arts, makes local snacks, and picks up lotus lantern making.

programme.title: Tuesday Report : Gone Before Goodbye - EP 1 星期二特写 : 来不及说再见
programme.desc: Words she never said become a song — her last gift to a mother who loved her like no one else. When COVID took her mother across the South China Sea from her hometown in Sibu, Wong Ei Ei lost the one voice she never knew she needed. No more daily calls. No Norway trip. No chance to say sorry, or thank you, face-to-face. Now, all that love and guilt has nowhere to go — except into the music.

programme.desc: Kisah yang diinspirasikan daripada pemenang pingat emas Paralimpik, Mohamad Ridzuan yang menghadapi penyakit 'Cebral Palsy' dan abangnya yang sentiasa ada di sisinya.

programme.title: Sekolah Api
programme.desc: Api, gangster yang meningkat naik cuba memenuhi amanat arwah neneknya untuk menghabiskan SPM. Dia jatuh cinta dengan guru Bahasa Inggeris dan sanggup melakukan apa saja untuk memenangi hati guru tersebut.

programme.title: Balapan
programme.desc: Kisah empat orang remaja yang telah menjadi musuh sejak sekian lama di lapangan balapan acara pecut 100meter peringkat daerah Selangor dan akhirnya menjadi sahabat seperjuangan.

programme.title: Lampu Merah
programme.desc: Si lelaki sukakan si perempuan, tanpa sedar yang si perempuan itu psiko dan obses dengan cintanya. Cara untuk selamatkan diri hanya dengan jatuh cinta dengan si perempuan semula.

programme.title: Bini Aku Dari...
programme.desc: Lydia dan Rudy telah pun berkahwin. Lydia nak anak walaupun Rudy belum bersedia lagi. Perangai Lydia makin menjadi- jadi apabila mengikut hukum hakam dari kakiberamal.com.

programme.title: Tebus
programme.desc: Anak perempuan Mikail telah di culik dan untuk menyelamatkan anaknya dia cuba mengimbau kembali sejarah lampau dirinya ketika menyertai kumpulan gangster.

programme.title: Survival 486
programme.desc: Syuhada going hiking to Gunung Tahan with her friends. Unfortunately, she got lost and fell into a deep hole and trapped there for 19 days.

programme.title: Cik Paris Diva Kampung
programme.desc: Zulaikha merupakan seroang gadis bandar yang mencabar diri untuk hidup di kampung lalu terpikat dengan jejaka kampung yang berjaya menawan hatinya.

programme.title: Budak Dari Tak Bai
programme.desc: Melalui kehidupan yang getir, Johari meninggalkan Tak Bai pada zaman kanak-kanak ke Kota Bharu. Peristiwa hitam membuatkannya hanyut dalam dunia gelap. Dilakonkan oleh Kamal Adli dan Nabila Huda.

programme.title: Delen
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Delen yang mula rasa terancam apabila Emily mula menyukai pelajar baru bernama Robert. Sejak itu, bermulalah persaingan antara Delen dan Robert demi merebut cinta Emily.

programme.title: Bro Jenin
programme.desc: Kisah Jenin yang telah masuk ke zaman kini. Dia berjumpa dengan seorang animator, Emily. Wujud perbezaan pendapat maka terjadi lah kisah2 lucu dan akhirnya Jenin terpaksa pulang ke tempat asalnya.

programme.desc: A drama about love and family adapted from the Indomesian popular drama series/soap opera, "Syurga Yang Kedua". It tells the story of Sabrina who has difficulties in conceiving and doesn’t know that her husband has married her best friend Dr. Vanida during coma.

programme.desc: US gymnast Simone Biles puts his mental health first before the gold at Tokyo 2020, Adam Scott offers Australia his first US Masters and Iceland gets talked about at Euro 2016.

programme.title: The Inside Line - Redbull - EP3
programme.desc: We focus on the cutting-edge team of Grand Prix, Red Bull Racing.

programme.title: The Front Row - Driver Training - EP1
programme.desc: We explore the methods and training approaches used by Formula 1 drivers to prepare for an F1 season, notably Lewis Hamilton and Max Verstappen.

programme.title: The Iconic - Formula 1 - EP5
programme.desc: Ferrari is the best known F1 brand in the world, Lewis Hamilton is an icon of F1, just like the Monaco circuit, while Seb Vettel's year 2013 was a super season for F1.

programme.title: Fight Stars - Amanda Nunes - EP15
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, meet the biggest stars of combat sports, such as UFC champion Amanda Nunes and boxer David Hayes. We look back at the highs and lows of Mike Tyson's career, and finally Nikki Bella's waking dream!

programme.title: Flashpoint - Borg & Mcenroe/ Tyson & Holyfield - EP12
programme.desc: Bjorn Borg and John McEnroe have set new standards in men's tennis, while Mike Tyson and Evander Holyfield have reached new summits in heavyweight boxing. These two rivalries have created historic tensions.

programme.title: The Iconic - Misbehaviour - EP29
programme.desc: Emblematic misdemeanours in sport, with Mike Tyson, Marion Jones and Eric Cantona.

programme.title: Top 20 - Beautiful Houses - EP185
programme.desc: Top Trace is the ranking of the news of the champions causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: Invincible - Nadia Comaneci - EP34
programme.desc: When we talk of perfection in sport, we talk of Nadia Comaneci.

programme.title: Foul Play - Hand Of God - EP7
programme.desc: The Hand of God, cheating or genius?

programme.title: Star Block Workout - South Africa - EP6
programme.desc: Meet @mrblockworkout, ex-bad boy who has created his own fitness method using only the urban environment! See @John_Carol, @iammulo, @tembisa and @leolarge take up his challenges at Wits university in Jo'burg!

programme.title: Mellodees - Baa Baa Black Sheep - EP9
programme.desc: Join our dance party at The Farm. Dee shows the sheep how to get down.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep18 - EP118
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Win Klaus Win! - EP123
programme.desc: Klaus may have finally met his match as his rival, Niccolo Tessio, beats him in an official race, but Klaus has an ace up his sleeve: magic tires.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep7 - EP107
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep1 - EP1
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Responsibility - EP113
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn that we must fulfil our responsibilities, and in that way, we will be able to be in harmony with other people. We will discover how to be attentive to help both at school and at home. And in this way, we can learn more each day and be up to date with each task.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Tolerance - EP114
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that tolerance is about living in harmony, accepting, and respecting the tastes of other people, as well as helping those who need it without expecting to receive something in return. We are all different and that makes the world so special, that's why you have to be supportive and show solidarity for others.

programme.title: Mellodees - Old MacDonald - EP8
programme.desc: Dee takes a trip to The Farm. Join him on this fun filled adventure and learn about the different sounds these cute little farm animals make. You might even see some familiar faces!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep10 - EP110
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Watery Diversion - EP205
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight Nick Slick from building a dam to illegally move water downstream.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Night Beat - EP114
programme.desc: Tibbs tries to be like Officer Cool, her favourite character from the TV series "Night Beat."

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Mutant Mascot / Freaky Furry - EP111
programme.desc: When their new guinea pig mutates into a big furry monster, the kids seek a way to revert the effect, and find the answer in genetics. / When a freak accident causes Angie to switch bodies with her dog, Skeezer falls hard for the “new Angie” while the “old Angie” goes rabid with frustration!

programme.desc: Shaq's favourite pizzeria is swamped with orders, luckily the Shaq Paq has nothing better to do that day, so they sign up to help deliver.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - The Monster Not Under the Bed / Nanobots Byte - EP112
programme.desc: The Secret Lab Kids shrink themselves to microscopic proportions in order to prove to Joelle that there are no monsters hiding under her bed. They just didn’t count on all the other microscopic creatures. / When Angie's garbage-eating nanobytes escape from the lab, the Secret Lab Kids must stop them before they turn the planet into one giant feeding ground.
